sentences.target: Je lie la sauce avec un peu de farine.
sentences.reading: /ʒə li la sos avɛk œ̃ pø də faʁin/

translations.fr: Je lie la sauce avec un peu de farine.
translations.ipa: /ʒə li la sos avɛk œ̃ pø də faʁin/
translations.en: I thicken the sauce with a bit of flour.
translations.es: Espeso la salsa con un poco de harina.
translations.de: Ich binde die Sauce mit etwas Mehl.
translations.it: Addenso la salsa con un po' di farina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我用一点面粉把酱汁调稠。
translations.yue: 我用少少麵粉令個汁稠啲。
translations.ru: Я загущаю соус небольшим количеством муки.
translations.pt: Eu engrosso o molho com um pouco de farinha.
translations.he: אני מסמיך את הרוטב בקצת קמח.
translations.vi: Tôi làm đặc nước sốt với một ít bột mì.
translations.nl: Ik bind de saus met een beetje bloem.
translations.hu: Egy kis liszttel sűrítem a mártást.
translations.hi: मैं थोड़े आटे से सॉस को गाढ़ा करता हूँ।
translations.el: Πήζω τη σάλτσα με λίγο αλεύρι.
translations.nb: Jeg jevner sausen med litt mel.
translations.id: Saya mengentalkan saus dengan sedikit tepung.
translations.sv: Jag reder såsen med lite mjöl.
translations.da: Jeg jævner saucen med lidt mel.
translations.ja: 少量の小麦粉でソースにとろみをつけます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular of “lier”; here used in a culinary sense to thicken/bind the sauce.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of “sauce”.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of “lie”.
Preposition introducing an instrumental complement (“avec un peu de farine”).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of “peu”.
Measure noun; head of the quantified phrase “un peu de …”.
Preposition linking the measure noun “peu” to the substance “farine” (partitive/measure construction).
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition “de” within the measure phrase.

sentences.target: Tu peux lier ton compte Facebook.

translations.fr: Tu peux lier ton compte Facebook.
translations.en: You can link your Facebook account.
translations.es: Puedes vincular tu cuenta de Facebook.
translations.it: Puoi collegare il tuo account Facebook.
translations.ru: Ты можешь привязать свой аккаунт Facebook.
translations.pt: Você pode vincular sua conta do Facebook.
translations.he: אפשר לקשר את חשבון הפייסבוק שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể liên kết tài khoản Facebook của mình.
translations.uk: Ти можеш прив’язати свій обліковий запис Facebook.
translations.hi: तुम अपना फेसबुक अकाउंट जोड़ सकते हो।
translations.pl: Możesz połączyć swoje konto na Facebooku.
translations.el: Μπορείς να συνδέσεις τον λογαριασμό σου στο Facebook.
translations.nb: Du kan koble til Facebook-kontoen din.
translations.id: Anda bisa menautkan akun Facebook Anda.
translations.ro: Îți poți conecta contul de Facebook.
translations.cs: Můžeš propojit svůj účet na Facebooku.
translations.ja: Facebookアカウントを連携できます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; marks the subject.
Main/modal verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; takes the infinitive “lier” as its complement.
Infinitive verb; lexical complement (xcomp) of “peux”, expressing the action possible.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies “compte”.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of “lier”.
Proper noun (brand/platform); nominal complement specifying the type of account (“compte Facebook”).

sentences.target: Elle lie les fleurs avec une ficelle.
sentences.reading: /ɛl li le flœʁ avɛk yn fisɛl/

translations.fr: Elle lie les fleurs avec une ficelle.
translations.ipa: /ɛl li le flœʁ avɛk yn fisɛl/
translations.en: She ties the flowers with a string.
translations.es: Ella ata las flores con un cordel.
translations.de: Sie bindet die Blumen mit einer Schnur zusammen.
translations.it: Lei lega i fiori con uno spago.
translations.zh-Hans: 她用一根细绳把花扎起来。
translations.pt: Ela amarra as flores com um barbante.
translations.vi: Cô ấy buộc hoa bằng một sợi dây.
translations.nl: Ze bindt de bloemen vast met een touwtje.
translations.hi: वह फूलों को एक डोरी से बाँधती है।
translations.el: Δένει τα λουλούδια με ένα σπάγκο.
translations.nb: Hun binder blomstene med en snor.
translations.id: Dia mengikat bunga dengan seutas tali.
translations.sv: Hon binder blommorna med ett snöre.
translations.ro: Ea leagă florile cu un șnur.
translations.da: Hun binder blomsterne med en snor.
translations.ja: 彼女は花をひもで束ねる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person feminine singular.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Definite article, plural; determiner of “fleurs”.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of “lie”.
Preposition introducing the instrument used to tie the flowers.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of “ficelle”.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition “avec”.

sentences.target: On lie ces deux idées pour le rapport.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ li se dø ide puʁ lə ʁapɔʁ/

translations.fr: On lie ces deux idées pour le rapport.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ li se dø ide puʁ lə ʁapɔʁ/
translations.en: We connect these two ideas for the report.
translations.es: Conectamos estas dos ideas para el informe.
translations.de: Wir verbinden diese beiden Ideen für den Bericht.
translations.it: Colleghiamo queste due idee per la relazione.
translations.ko: 보고서를 위해 이 두 가지 아이디어를 연결한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们为了报告把这两个想法联系起来。
translations.yue: 我哋為咗報告將呢兩個想法連繫起來。
translations.ru: Мы связываем эти две идеи для отчёта.
translations.pt: Nós conectamos essas duas ideias para o relatório.
translations.he: אנחנו מחברים את שני הרעיונות האלה לדוח.
translations.tr: Rapor için bu iki fikri birleştiriyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi kết nối hai ý tưởng này cho báo cáo.
translations.ar: نحن نربط هاتين الفكرتين من أجل التقرير.
translations.nl: We verbinden deze twee ideeën voor het rapport.
translations.uk: Ми поєднуємо ці дві ідеї для звіту.
translations.hu: A jelentéshez összekapcsoljuk ezt a két ötletet.
translations.hi: हम रिपोर्ट के लिए इन दो विचारों को जोड़ते हैं।
translations.pl: Łączymy te dwie idee na potrzeby raportu.
translations.el: Συνδέουμε αυτές τις δύο ιδέες για την αναφορά.
translations.nb: Vi kobler sammen disse to ideene til rapporten.
translations.id: Kami menghubungkan dua ide ini untuk laporan.
translations.sv: Vi kopplar ihop de här två idéerna för rapporten.
translations.ro: Conectăm aceste două idei pentru raport.
translations.cs: Spojujeme tyto dvě myšlenky pro zprávu.
translations.da: Vi forbinder disse to idéer til rapporten.
translations.fi: Yhdistämme nämä δύο ideaa raporttia varten.
translations.ja: 報告書のためにこの二つのアイデアをつなげます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun, 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies “idées”.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies “idées”.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of “lie”.
Preposition expressing purpose; introduces the goal clause of the action.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of “rapport”.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition “pour”.
